title: Sweets and Candy® Pink Hearts 1Kg - Strawberry Chocolate Candy Hearts with Pink and White Crunchy Sprinkles - Retro Heart Shaped Chocolates for Weddings, Valentines, and Love Gifts - Bulk 1 Kilo Bag
features: Pick and Mix Sweets Share Bags - Pink Hearts in a bulk 1kg share bag! These are strawberry flavour chocolate candy pieces shaped like hearts with a candy sprinkles topping!

Retro Pick and Mix Sweets - A fun gift for every age! Adults and children LOVE our large selection of sweets and candy! The PERFECT gift for everyone! Allows you to experience your favourite childhood memories and all the tasty sweets that came with it!
Perfect Gift For Any Occasion- A fantastic gift idea for Christmas, Easter, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, Halloween, Valentine’s Day, Birthdays, Anniversaries or just to say Thanks!
Great For Sharing with family, friends or co-workers in the office. An iconic sweet treat
Traditional Sweets - We stock an impressive collection of sweets, all made with the best manufacturers available. Freshly packaged and delivered to you.
Bulk Sweets – These 1 Kilo bulk sweets are fantastic for events, weddings, parties, get-togethers or perfect cinema treats!
100s of Pick and Mix Sweets – Use the drop down box to view all the varieties of tasty sweets and candy we stock in these large share size bags!
description: Product description Pick and Mix Share Bags Pink Hearts – 1kg Bulk Bag Sweet, chocolatey, and irresistibly pretty – our Pink Hearts are a true pick and mix favourite. Made with smooth strawberry flavoured chocolate candy and topped with a generous layer of pink and white sprinkles, these heart shaped treats are as delightful to look at as they are to eat. Supplied in a 1kg bulk bag, Pink Hearts are perfect for filling sweet jars, candy buffets, and party bags, or for sharing with loved ones. Whether for birthdays, Valentine’s Day, weddings, or simply indulging at home, these colourful chocolate treats add a touch of fun and sweetness to any occasion. Key Features: Strawberry chocolate candy hearts topped with crunchy sprinkles Pretty pink and white decoration makes them stand out Supplied in a large 1kg bulk bag – ideal for sharing and stocking up A pick and mix classic loved by kids and adults alike Perfect for parties, weddings, candy buffets, or sweet jars PERFECT GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION - A fantastic pick and mix gift idea for Valentine’s Day, Anniversaries, Baby Showers, Wedding Favours or just to say Thanks! GREAT FOR SHARING - Pick and mix is great for sharing with family, friends or co-workers in the office. Perfect for parties and weddings! Ingredients: Sugar, Vegetable Fat (Palm), Whey Powder (From MILK), WHEAT Flour (With Added Calcium, lron, Niacin Thiamin) WHEAT Starch, Emulsifier (SOYA Lecithin), Glucose Syrup, Natural Flavourings, Natural Colours (Carmine, Betanin), Glazing Agent (Beeswax). For allergens please see ingredients listed in CAPITALS. Our sweets are packed in an environment that handles WHEAT, GLUTEN, SOYA, MILK, PEANUTS and NUTS.
